name: @ccctl/web-ui
description: ccctl zero-build static UI: plain HTML + vanilla ES modules (EventSource + fetch), no framework, no bundler
author: Alexey Pelykh (https://github.com/alexey-pelykh)

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html manifest.webmanifest sw.js icon.svg dist/ && cp -r src dist/ && find dist/src -name '*.test.js' -delete
scripts.typecheck: node --check src/app.js && node --check src/transcript.js && node --check src/command.js && node --check src/sessions.js && node --check src/connection.js && node --check src/pairing.js && node --check src/devices.js && node --check src/launch.js && node --check src/stop.js && node --check src/push.js && node --check sw.js
scripts.dev: echo "serve this directory statically, e.g. npx serve ."
